who: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Reconciling vendor invoices with purchase orders efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and purchase order matching on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
